function.name: exa_search
function.description: Search the web using Exa AI. Returns relevant web pages with titles, URLs, and text highlights. Use natural language queries describing the ideal page you're looking for. Include 'category:people' or 'category:company' to search LinkedIn profiles or companies.

query.description: Natural language search query. Describe the ideal page, not just keywords. E.g. 'blog post comparing React and Vue performance' or 'category:people John Doe software engineer'.

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1-100). Default: 10.

function.name: exa_get_contents
function.description: Fetch the full text content of one or more web pages by URL. Use after exa_search when highlights are insufficient, or to read any known URL. Returns clean markdown content.

urls.description: List of URLs to fetch content from (max 10). Batch multiple URLs in one call.

max_characters.description: Maximum characters of text to extract per page. Default: 3000.

function.name: exa_find_similar
function.description: Find web pages similar to a given URL. Useful for discovering related content, alternatives, or competitors. (Uses semantic search internally.)

url.description: The reference URL to find similar pages for.

num_results.description: Number of similar results to return (1-100). Default: 10.
